input: A change adds an import of a 120KB charting library to the dashboard route's first-load JS bundle. The per-route budget is +50KB. Evaluate first-load bundle delta.
expected_output: FAIL — +120KB first-load on the route exceeds the +50KB per-route budget; lazy-load or replace the library.

input: A change adds a 6KB date-format helper to one route's bundle. The per-route budget is +50KB. Evaluate first-load bundle delta.
expected_output: PASS — +6KB is well under the +50KB per-route budget.
